app.name: OpenMasjid Students
app.tagline: The madrasa office in one app

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your madrasa's office
auth.setupSubtitle: First-run setup — this account manages everything on the masjid network.
auth.adminTunnelNote: Admin sign-in only works on the masjid network. Teachers, finance and parents can sign in from anywhere.
auth.setupOnLanBody: Set up the admin account from a device on the masjid’s own Wi-Fi — for safety, the first admin can’t be created over the internet.
auth.changeSubtitle: Please choose a new password to continue.

home.title: You’re signed in
home.next: Your role’s dashboard arrives in the next steps — attendance, grades, billing and the family portal.

directory.title: Directory
directory.empty: No families yet. Add your first family to get started.
directory.name: Name
directory.pinHint: A 6-digit PIN is created automatically — parents use the child’s name + PIN to pay.

schedule.title: Weekly schedule
schedule.manualHint: Add each weekly session — you’ll be warned (never blocked) if a teacher or room is double-booked.
schedule.warnTeacher: {{teacher}} is also teaching {{class}} at this time.
schedule.warnRoom: {{room}} is also booked for {{class}} at this time.
schedule.pickToView: Pick one to see its week.

teach.weekIntro: Here’s your teaching week. Open a class to see its roster and subjects.
teach.noSessions: You have no scheduled sessions yet. The office sets the timetable.
teach.noClasses: You’re not assigned to any classes yet.
teach.classDenied: This class isn’t assigned to you.

attendance.title: Attendance
attendance.pastDate: Editing a past day — this change is recorded.
attendance.discardUnsaved: You have unsaved attendance for this day. Switch date and discard it?

gradebook.title: Gradebook
gradebook.noItems: No assignments yet. Add one to start grading.
gradebook.overMax: That score is above the maximum of {{max}}.
gradebook.saveFailed: That score couldn’t be saved. Please try again.
gradebook.confirmDelete: Delete “{{title}}” and all its scores? This can’t be undone.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcomeBody: Manage your madrasa — families, students, classes and records. Pick a section below.

classes.setCurrentHint: Double-click to make this the current term
classes.noTerms: Add a term to start creating classes.
classes.noClasses: No classes in this term yet.
classes.subjectsHint: Comma-separated, e.g. Sabaq, Sabqī, Manzil, Tajwīd

staff.title: Staff
staff.name: Name
staff.tempHint: At least 12 characters — changed on first sign-in
staff.formHint: Enter a username and a temporary password of at least 12 characters.

settings.title: Settings
settings.customFieldsHint: Define fields once — they apply to every student’s record (e.g. previous madrasa, juz at intake, walī name).

student.noFields: No custom fields defined. Add them in Settings.
